# MAMS | Miles Agee — Richmond Real Estate

> Richmond's neighborhood-level real estate expert. Buyer and seller representation across 40+ neighborhoods in Greater Richmond, Virginia.

## About

MAMS is a licensed real estate brand led by Miles Agee, serving the Greater Richmond, Virginia metro area. We specialize in buyer representation, seller representation, and relocation services. Our approach is neighborhood-first: we match clients to the right area based on lifestyle, budget, commute, and vibe before ever showing a home.

Miles Agee is a licensed Realtor in the Commonwealth of Virginia and a Richmond native with block-level knowledge of the metro area.

## Contact

## Free Resources

### Richmond Relocation Guide
A comprehensive 78-page guide covering 20+ neighborhoods, side-by-side comparisons with price ranges, school districts, commute times, lifestyle highlights, parks, James River access, and everything you need before your first showing. Available free at https://mamsnow.com (scroll to "Free Guide" section).

### Richmond Neighborhood Matching Quiz
A free interactive quiz at https://mamsnow.com/quiz that matches you with your ideal Richmond neighborhood based on 7 questions about your lifestyle, budget, walkability preference, commute tolerance, and vibe. Personalized results with real market data.

## Areas Served

### Richmond City Neighborhoods
- The Fan & Museum District
- Church Hill
- Scott's Addition
- Jackson Ward
- Manchester
- Byrd Park & Carytown
- Shockoe Bottom
- Fulton & Rocketts Landing
- Laburnum Park & Northside
- Forest Hill
- Ginter Park
- The West End (City)
- Lakeside
- Oregon Hill

### Henrico County (Short Pump / Glen Allen)
- Short Pump
- Glen Allen
- Wyndham
- Twin Hickory
- West Broad Village
- River Road Corridor
- Wellesley
- Foxhall

### Chesterfield County (Midlothian / Moseley)
- Midlothian
- Moseley
- Brandermill
- Woodlake
- Salisbury
- Hallsley
- Magnolia Green
- FoxCreek

### Hanover County (Mechanicsville)
- Mechanicsville
- Atlee / Elmont
- Cold Harbor / Studley
- Ashland
- Beaverdam / Northern Hanover

### Outer Ring
- Goochland County
- Powhatan County
- Southern Chesterfield
- New Kent & Charles City

## Services

- Buyer Representation
- Seller Representation
- Relocation Services
- Neighborhood Consultation
- Market Analysis
- First-Time Homebuyer Guidance

## What Makes MAMS Different

1. Neighborhood-first approach: We match lifestyle to location before showing homes
2. Content-driven expertise: Hundreds of videos and guides about Richmond neighborhoods
3. Data transparency: Real market data, pricing trends, and honest assessments
4. Relocation specialty: Extensive experience helping out-of-state buyers find the right Richmond neighborhood
5. 5.0 rating across 26+ verified Zillow reviews
